Zone.title: Zone
Zone.description: Represents a geographical or logical area used for grouping client cards and generating reports. All digital and physical card entries are associated with a zone.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Zone entity.

name.description: The human-readable name of the zone (e.g., 'North Region', 'Downtown Branch').

description.description: An optional, more detailed description of the zone, its purpose, or boundaries.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the zone record was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the zone record was last updated.

DigitalCard.title: DigitalCard
DigitalCard.description: Represents a client card record stored digitally in the system, managed by the 'Digital Card Management' feature.

id.description: Unique identifier for the DigitalCard entity.

cardNumber.description: The primary identification number printed on the digital client card.

clientName.description: The full name of the client associated with this digital card.

clientIdentifier.description: An additional unique identifier for the client, such as a national ID (DNI) or tax ID, used for verification.

issuedDate.description: The date when the digital card was originally issued.

expirationDate.description: The date when the digital card is set to expire.

status.description: The current operational status of the digital card (e.g., 'Active', 'Inactive', 'Blocked', 'Pending').

zoneId.description: Reference to the Zone this digital card belongs to for grouping and reporting. (Relationship: Zone 1:N DigitalCard)

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the digital card record was created in the system.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the digital card record was last updated.

CuadreRow.title: CuadreRow
CuadreRow.description: Represents a row in the reconciliation sheet for a specific zone, tracking system totals vs physical statuses.

digitalTotal.description: Count of active cards in system for this page.

PhysicalCardEntry.title: PhysicalCardEntry
PhysicalCardEntry.description: Represents data manually entered or captured from a physical client card, intended for comparison and reconciliation with digital records.

id.description: Unique identifier for the PhysicalCardEntry entity.

enteredCardNumber.description: The primary identification number as entered or scanned from the physical client card.

enteredClientName.description: The full name of the client as entered from the physical card.

enteredClientIdentifier.description: An additional unique identifier for the client, such as a national ID (DNI) or tax ID, as entered from the physical card.

inputDate.description: Timestamp when this physical card data was manually entered or recorded in the system.

zoneId.description: Reference to the Zone where this physical card entry was made or belongs, for localized reconciliation. (Relationship: Zone 1:N PhysicalCardEntry)

notes.description: Any additional manual notes or observations regarding this specific physical card entry.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the physical card entry record was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the physical card entry record was last updated.

Reconciliation.title: Reconciliation
Reconciliation.description: Records the outcome of a comparison and matching process between a PhysicalCardEntry and a DigitalCard, supporting AI suggestions and user-driven reconciliation.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Reconciliation entity.

physicalCardEntryId.description: Reference to the PhysicalCardEntry being reconciled. This forms a 1:1 relationship for a specific reconciliation event. (Relationship: PhysicalCardEntry 1:1 Reconciliation)

digitalCardId.description: Reference to the DigitalCard that was matched (or attempted to be matched) with the physical entry. Can be null if the physical card remains unmatched. (Relationship: DigitalCard 1:N Reconciliation)

matchConfidence.description: A confidence score (e.g., 0.0 to 1.0) indicating the strength of an AI-suggested match. Null if the match was manually made without AI input.

matchReason.description: A textual explanation for the suggested or confirmed match, either generated by the AI or provided by a user.

status.description: The final status of the reconciliation for this entry (e.g., 'Matched', 'Unmatched', 'Conflict', 'Reviewed').

discrepancies.description: An array of strings, each describing a specific discrepancy identified between the physical entry and the digital card during reconciliation.

reconciledBy.description: The user ID of the person who performed or confirmed this reconciliation. This assumes an external authentication system for user management.

reconciliationDate.description: Timestamp when the reconciliation was performed or finalized.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when this reconciliation record was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when this reconciliation record was last updated.

definition.description: Main collection for geographical or logical zones.
Stores manually entered physical card data.
Records the outcomes of matching physical and digital cards.
